allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); try{const v=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('latest ai-sdk/anthropic versions:', v.slice\(-5\).join\(', '\)\)}catch\(e\){}")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const v=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('last 5:', v.slice\(-5\).join\(', '\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.slice\(-200\)\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "const ai = require\('./node_modules/ai'\); const keys = Object.keys\(ai\).sort\(\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => ['streamText','appendResponseMessages','tool','Message'].some\(n => k.includes\(n\)\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/next/node_modules/postcss/package.json'\); console.log\('next bundled postcss:', p.version\)")
Bash(node -e "const ai = require\('./node_modules/ai'\); const keys = Object.keys\(ai\).sort\(\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")
